label: Shamrock Automations
info: This is the primary flow for receiving Wix webhooks and routing data to Twilio, Slack, or Google Apps Script.

info: Processes court emails every 30 min via GAS CourtEmailProcessor

label: The Closer
info: Automated drip campaigns for abandoned intakes — SMS follow-up at 1h, 24h, 72h

label: Morning Briefing
info: Daily 7AM ops report + system health check to Telegram & Slack

label: The Bounty Hunter
info: Scraper results → lead scoring → hot leads to Slack

info: System health monitor — pings all services every 5 min, alerts on failures

label: GAS Scheduler
info:

All GAS time-driven triggers have been migrated here.

label: WhatsApp Campaigns

⚠️ DISABLED — Waiting on 10DLC/A2P campaign approval.

label: SignNow Tracker
info:
Polls SignNow for unsigned packets and sends reminders.
Auto-reminds at 2h, 12h, 24h after sending.

label: Review Harvester
info:
48h after bond posted → auto-text asking for Google review.
Boosts SEO and Google Business Profile.

label: Payment Reminders
info:
⚠️ DISABLED — Waiting on text campaign approval.
3 days before payment plan installment → SMS reminder.
Reduces missed payments and forfeiture risk.

label: No-Show Escalation
info:
Monitors check-ins and court appearances.
Missed check-in or court date → instant Slack + staff call.
Protects the bottom line on active bonds.

label: Intake Pipeline
info:
End-to-end intake: Webhook → Slack → SignNow packet → Signing link → Confirmation.
No manual steps. Fully automated from intake to bond posting.

label: Revenue Snapshot
info: Daily at 6 PM — pulls payment data, calculates revenue stats, sends to Slack + Telegram.

label: The Scout
info:
Geographic expansion — scrapes county jails for new arrest data.
Targets counties beyond current coverage.
Feeds into Bounty Hunter for lead scoring.

label: Staff Performance
info: Weekly staff performance report — response times, cases closed, revenue per agent.

label: Weather Posting
info:
Adjusts social posting based on local weather and events.
Storms + holidays = higher arrest rates = more posts.

⚡ GAS SCHEDULER — Node-RED is the Single Control Plane
info:
This tab replaces ALL GAS time-driven triggers.

HOW IT WORKS:
  1. Cron inject fires at the scheduled time
  2. Function node preps the GAS action payload
  3. HTTP request calls GAS web app
  4. Result handler checks success/failure
  5. On failure → alerts Slack #alerts

TO DISABLE: Click the inject node → set to disabled
TO RE-SCHEDULE: Click inject → change cron expression
